# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to the MATRIX v0.2 research schema package.

MATRIX v0.2 is a research-stage framework for verifiable AI governance, institutional traceability, fail-closed governance, and responsibility-preserving event records.

6. Human Oversight and Responsibility Check

Please confirm:

[ ] This change does not support full automation of public authority decisions.

[ ] This change does not replace legally required human judgment.

[ ] This change preserves human validation where institutional decisions are involved.

[ ] This change preserves responsibility ownership by a human or accountable institution.

[ ] This change preserves auditability and contestability.
